action.reasoning: Observation: Last iteration failed due to an inline Python command not importing timm, but predict.py itself has the correct imports. The ensemble on val achieved 0.8480 bal_acc with weights (0.5, 0.4, 0.1). Best single model test was 0.8346. Analysis: The predict.py ensemble should work fine - the error was in a separate validation command, not in predict.py. Decision: Submit eval directly with the current predict.py and best_s1.pt checkpoint (predict.py auto-detects and ensembles all available models).
